Name: Neon Asian Street Food
Location: 17 Camden Street Lower, Saint Kevin's, Dublin, D02 TX94, Ireland
Protein: -.5 Tofu was lacked flavor and and had inconsistent portion but was cut and fried well
Sauce: -1 Sauce was oddly sweet and lacked flavor

Name: Lemongrass
Location: ARIA Resort & Casino, 3730 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89158, USA
Noodles: Noodles: fine, if a bit thin
